approvalSource: Steve gave GREEN LIGHT for the revised UI-MENU-LAYOUT-POLISH-001 plan after it added exact inventory split rules, concrete desktop/mobile acceptance, named artifacts, clear API boundary, current-truth correction, verifier coverage, and explicit no-scope boundaries.
notes: Approval covers only UI/menu/layout polish, System Inventory current-vs-archive/history split, current-truth next-card correction, route/manual review proof, and verifier/process coverage. It does not approve Recent Work redesign, comprehensive changelog, daily summary, source lifecycle expansion, Strategy, Scoper, Agent Factory, corpus, research cleanup, action-review cleanup, or a new feature lane.
